title: SQL: view / alias problem
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE b (id SERIAL, value VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO b (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test2'), (DEFAULT, NULL);
CREATE VIEW aview AS SELECT id, value FROM a WHERE id > 0;
key_bug_features: INNER JOIN with view causes unexpected behavior
